## Docs impact

<!-- The docs are load-bearing for humans and coding agents alike. Tick what applies: -->

- [ ] New or changed domain term → updated `CONTEXT.md`
- [ ] Structural change (new module, moved seam, renamed file) → updated `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] Durable, surprising decision with a real trade-off → added an ADR in `docs/adr/`
- [ ] Test workflow change → updated `docs/testing.md`
- [ ] No docs impact
